changes.description: Baseline run with unmodified verbose skill (identical to skills/statistical-analysis/SKILL.md)

Compressed skill from 206 to ~70 lines. Removed assumption checking, paired t-test, chi-square example, Pearson correlation, APA reporting format, eta-squared, r-as-effect-size benchmarks. Merged ANOVA + post-hoc into single pipeline with inline Bonferroni. Added explicit JSON output templates with exact field names for both task types. Condensed OLS regression + VIF into single pipeline block.
